title: Bridge Essay: Psycho-neuro-endocrine-immune mechanisms of action of yoga in type II diabetes.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Heat/Fire** (Phase 3) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Heat/Fire to mechanistic neuroscience through Psycho-neuro-endocrine-immune, mechanisms, of, action, of.

**Psycho-neuro-endocrine-immune mechanisms of action of yoga in type II diabetes.** — Anc Sci Life. PMID: 26600662. DOI: 10.4103/0257-7941.165623. Yoga has been found to benefit all the components of health viz. physical, mental, social and spiritual well being by incorporating awide variety of practices. Pathophysiology of Type II DM and co-morbidities in Type II DM has been correlated with stress mechanisms. Stress suppresses body'simmune system and neuro-humoral actions thereby aff ecting normal psychological state. It would not be wrong to state that correlation of diabetes with stress, anxiety and other psychological factors are bid
